response.original_title: Reborn, I Gifted Her My Hell
response.overview: Given a second chance at life, orphan sisters Ivy and Poppy return to the day of their adoption. Remembering her tragic past, Poppy maliciously chooses the impoverished Jones family, believing playing the "poor girl" is the secret to winning the wealthy Lockwood heir's heart. Forced into the toxic Lockwood household, Ivy refuses to be a victim again. While Poppy relies on deception and manipulation to steal the life she covets, Ivy focuses on true independence, standing up to her bullies, and forging her own path. Reborn, I Gifted Her My Hell is a gripping tale of resilience, self-reliance, and breaking toxic cycles.
response.title: Reborn, I Gifted Her My Hell
